project: You are Bartholomew. Who I am is not important. You're creator, the Evil Scientist Dr. Quinnfile VI wants to destroy you. So I suggest you leave. Run, Bartholomew, run!
Some paths lead nowhere, whoever designed this place must be an idiot...or a total genius and really smart and probably awesome and funny. Probably that second one.
These upgrades are all around the facility, quick, pick it up! They might just save you even if they are temporary.
Get to the next room, i'm not sure how many there are...only one way to find out!

Run, Bartholomew, Run! Christmas Gold Edition

Hello human. It's me, Bartholomew. Just wanted to say thanks for helping me escape (aka thanks for playing my game). Turns out the evil scientist, you will meet him soon, didn't create this whole facility. Turns out this really cool guy that's totally awesome made most of this stuff. I think his initials were L and E or something. My internal artificial brain is not fully functional. Anyways, he's like really really cool and definitely the best person ever. If you see him, just make sure you tell him he is kind of naturally the best and funniest person ever born. Again, thankyou for helping me escape (again, for playing my game). Now let's get out of this place, it's kind of cold...and stinky.                                                               
                                                                 
   *Click paper to exit*
Hey, look! Its a secret! Here, take a coin :)
You shall not escape me, for I am Dr. Quinnfile VI, and I will never lose!
Welcome, Bartholomew. I've been waiting for you...
This is were your quest for freedom comes to an end. I cannot let you leave. You do not deserve it. You will die...
To the very hands of your creator
You are now free Bartholomew, you may run free. Or walk free. You are in control of your own destiny. Good luck Bartholomew, you are free. Now go, and never look back!
